name: obsidian-cli-skill
description: Obsidian CLI skill for Claude Code — interact with Obsidian vaults from the terminal

plugins.name: obsidian-cli
plugins.description: Interact with Obsidian vaults using the official Obsidian CLI (v1.12+). Read, create, append, search, and manage notes, daily notes, properties, tags, tasks, bookmarks, templates, themes, sync, plugins, and links — all from the terminal.
